creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 14:37:45 2012
New Revision: 304526
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304526

Log:
  Add trytond_party_siret 2.4.0, tryton Application Platform (Party Siret
  Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171470
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_party_siret/
  head/finance/trytond_party_siret/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party_siret/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party_siret/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party_siret/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:36:42 2012	(r304525)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:37:45 2012	(r304526)
@@ -129,6 +129,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_ldap_authentication
     SUBDIR += trytond_ldap_connection
     SUBDIR += trytond_party
+    SUBDIR += trytond_party_siret
     SUBDIR += trytond_product
     SUBDIR += trytond_product_cost_fifo
     SUBDIR += trytond_product_cost_history

Added: head/finance/trytond_party_siret/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party_siret/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:37:45 2012	(r304526)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_party_siret
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Party Siret Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_party>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_party
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_party_siret/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party_siret/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 14:37:45 2012	(r304526)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_party_siret-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 449d001b8605aa5312935671a6407ce8ab91679f3d2a3817d6c3b28edd75e27e
+SIZE (trytond_party_siret-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 19629

Added: head/finance/trytond_party_siret/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party_siret/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 14:37:45 2012	(r304526)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Party Siret Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_party_siret/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
